list-form-field-names.title: List Form Field Names in PDF using Aspose.Pdf Form
list-form-field-names.description: Opens a PDF form and prints all form field names to the console using the Aspose.Pdf Form facade.

add-text-field-formeditor.title: Add Text Field to PDF Using FormEditor
add-text-field-formeditor.description: Demonstrates how to add a new text form field at specific coordinates to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

fill-textbox-field.title: Fill Textbox Field in PDF using Form.FillField
fill-textbox-field.description: Demonstrates how to fill a textbox form field in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and save the result.

justify-textbox.title: Justify Text in a Form TextBox Using FormEditor
justify-textbox.description: Demonstrates how to apply justified alignment to a filled text box field in a PDF form using FormEditor and FormFieldFacade.

retrieve-radio-button-options.title: Retrieve Radio Button Options as Hashtable
retrieve-radio-button-options.description: Loads a PDF form, extracts all option values of a radio button group, and stores them in a Hashtable.

get-radio-button-value.title: Get Selected Radio Button Value from PDF Form
get-radio-button-value.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve the currently selected radio button option from a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf's Form class.

export-pdf-form-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XML
export-pdf-form-to-xml.description: Exports all form field values from a PDF document to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.ExportXml.

export-pdf-form-to-fdf.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
export-pdf-form-to-fdf.description: Demonstrates how to export the fields of an AcroForm PDF to an FDF file using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

export-pdf-form-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XFDF
export-pdf-form-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to export the fields of a PDF form to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

export-form-fields-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON and Verify Structure
export-form-fields-json.description: Loads a PDF, exports all form field values to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf, then reads the JSON to confirm it is a valid object and reports basic information.

import-form-xml.title: Import Form Field Values from XML into PDF
import-form-xml.description: Demonstrates how to import AcroForm field values from an XML file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

import-form-data-fdf.title: Import Form Data from FDF into PDF
import-form-data-fdf.description: Shows how to import form field values from an FDF file into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

import-form-fields-xfdf.title: Import Form Field Values from XFDF into PDF
import-form-fields-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to import AcroForm field values from an XFDF file into a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class.

import-form-data-json.title: Import Form Data from JSON into PDF
import-form-data-json.description: Demonstrates how to import AcroForm field values from a JSON file into a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class and handle possible errors.

batch-export-form-data-xml.title: Batch Export PDF Form Data to XML
batch-export-form-data-xml.description: Exports the fields of multiple PDF forms to separate XML files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

batch-import-form-json.title: Batch Import Form Data from JSON into PDFs in Parallel
batch-import-form-json.description: Demonstrates how to import form field values from JSON files into matching PDF documents concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

combine-pdf-json-data.title: Combine JSON Data from Multiple PDFs into a Single JSON Array
combine-pdf-json-data.description: Reads JSON files exported from PDFs, merges their contents into one JSON array, and writes the result to a file.

export-form-data-xml-memory.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML Using MemoryStream
export-form-data-xml-memory.description: Demonstrates how to export the fields of a PDF form to an XML stream using Aspose.Pdf without creating intermediate files on disk.

merge-form-data-json.title: Merge Form Data from Multiple PDFs into JSON
merge-form-data-json.description: Loads several PDF files, extracts their form field values, aggregates them, and writes the combined data to a JSON file.

export-selected-form-fields.title: Export Selected Form Fields to XML
export-selected-form-fields.description: Exports only form fields whose names start with "Customer" from a PDF to an XML file.

export-selected-form-fields-json.title: Export Selected Form Fields to JSON
export-selected-form-fields-json.description: Exports only the specified PDF form fields to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-form-values-json.title: Import PDF Form Values from JSON (ignore missing fields)
import-form-values-json.description: Shows how to import AcroForm field values from a JSON file into a PDF, automatically skipping any fields that are not present in the target document.

validate-xml-import.title: Validate XML against XSD before importing into PDF form
validate-xml-import.description: Demonstrates how to validate an XML file against an XSD schema and, if valid, import the data into an existing PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

import-export-form-utf8.title: Import and Export PDF Form Fields with UTF-8 Encoding
import-export-form-utf8.description: Demonstrates importing Unicode form field values from an XML file and exporting them back to XML using UTF‑8 encoded streams.

list-form-fields-csv.title: List Form Fields and Types to CSV using FormEditor
list-form-fields-csv.description: Demonstrates how to enumerate all form fields in a PDF, retrieve their types with FormEditor, and write the information to a CSV file.

export-text-field-names.title: Export Text Form Field Names to JSON
export-text-field-names.description: Loads a PDF, filters its form fields to include only text fields, and writes the field names to a JSON array.

add-radio-button-group.title: Add Radio Button Group with Default Selection using FormEditor
add-radio-button-group.description: Demonstrates how to add a radio button group with three options to a PDF and set the default selected option programmatically using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

verify-radio-button-options.title: Verify Radio Button Options in PDF Form
verify-radio-button-options.description: Loads a PDF form, retrieves the radio button options for a given field, and checks them against an expected set to ensure form integrity.

xfdf-roundtrip-form.title: Export and Import PDF Form Data via XFDF
xfdf-roundtrip-form.description: Demonstrates exporting form field values to an XFDF file, importing them back into a PDF, and verifying that the values are preserved after a round‑trip.

fill-pdf-form-from-json.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from JSON Template
fill-pdf-form-from-json.description: Loads a PDF form template, imports field values from a JSON file, and saves the populated PDF.

fill-pdf-form-from-byte-array.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from Byte Array
fill-pdf-form-from-byte-array.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, fills specified form fields using the Form facade, and returns the updated PDF as a byte array.

list-pdf-form-fields.title: List PDF Form Field Names as JSON
list-pdf-form-fields.description: Reads a PDF file, extracts all AcroForm field names, and prints them as a formatted JSON array.

fill-pdf-form-fields.title: Fill PDF Form Fields and Save Document
fill-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF form, fill its fields from a dictionary, and save the updated document.

export-form-data-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON and Deserialize with Json.NET
export-form-data-json.description: Demonstrates exporting PDF form fields to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf and then deserializing the JSON into a typed C# object with Json.NET for further processing.

export-form-data-json-split.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON and Split into Multiple Files
export-form-data-json-split.description: Exports all form fields from a PDF to JSON, then splits the JSON into separate files each containing up to 100 fields.

export-form-data-xml-to-html.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML and Transform to HTML using XSLT
export-form-data-xml-to-html.description: Demonstrates exporting form fields from a PDF to an XML file and then converting that XML to an HTML view using XSLT.

import-xml-form-validate.title: Import XML Form Data and Validate Required Fields
import-xml-form-validate.description: Demonstrates importing form data from an XML file into a PDF form and checking that required fields are filled, logging any missing values.

import-form-fields-missing-fields.title: Import Form Fields with Missing Field Handling
import-form-fields-missing-fields.description: Demonstrates importing form data from an XML file while handling missing fields by catching FormException and logging each absent field name.

export-pdf-form-data-xml-async.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML Asynchronously
export-pdf-form-data-xml-async.description: Demonstrates how to export form field data from a PDF to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form without blocking the UI thread by wrapping the operation in an async Task.

form-fields-report.title: Generate PDF Report of Form Fields
form-fields-report.description: Creates a PDF report containing a table that lists the names, types, and current values of all form fields in an existing PDF document.
